ground_truth.title: What To Watch On Streaming
ground_truth.main_content: Variety's curated streaming guide featuring recommended movies and TV shows across platforms. The page includes a 'Variety Recommends' section with titles like 'The Long Walk', 'One Battle After Another', 'If I Had Legs I'd Kick You', 'Cloud', 'The Naked Gun', 'The Phoenician Scheme', 'Eephus', and 'Honey Don't!'. Featured content includes Andy Garcia on 'Landman' with insights on working with Billy Bob Thornton and Taylor Sheridan's writing. The 'Browse By Streamer' section highlights Amazon Prime Video offerings such as 'Fallout' Season 2, 'Malice', 'Hedda', 'John Candy: I Like Me', 'Play Dirty', 'Gen V', and 'The Terminal List: Dark Wolf'. Each title includes streaming links and critic reviews.
with: Variety Recommends - Catch up on the best titles coming to streaming.
Andy Garcia on 'Landman' - The star talks going head-to-head with Billy Bob Thornton.
Browse By Streamer - Variety's curated list of critic's picks and must see movies.
'Fallout' Season 2 - New Arrival on Amazon Prime Video.
The Terminal List: Dark Wolf - Chris Pratt returns in this Prime Video exclusive.
without: U.S. Edition / Asia Edition / Global Edition
